Math & Science · Nano Scale Conversions

Ångström to Nanometer Converter

Convert Å ↔ nm with scientific notation for nanoscience and spectroscopy contexts.

scientific
0
Scientific: –

Inputs & variables

  • Value
  • Direction (Å ↔ nm)
  • Significant figures
  • Scientific notation

Theory

Relationship: 10 Å = 1 nm. Å and nm are both sub-micrometer length scales.

Use scientific notation for clarity (e.g., 1.5e-10 m).

Examples

  • 1.54 Å (C–C bond length) → 0.154 nm.
  • 500 nm (green light) → 5000 Å (visible spectrum context).

FAQ

Where is Å used?

Common in crystallography and spectroscopy; nm dominates in nano-tech and biology.

Who was Ångström?

Anders Jonas Ångström, pioneer in spectroscopy; the unit honors his work.
